title: Trump’s Iran War Is Causing Problems For His Ally in Italy, Giorgia Meloni
summary_full: War in the Middle East has left Italy’s prime minister in a domestic bind, presenting her with one of the biggest challenges of a previously stable tenure.
summary_public: War in the Middle East has left Italy’s prime minister in a domestic bind, presenting her with one of the biggest challenges of a previously stable tenure.
